inventory_metadata.scope: UGRO Capital — GRO Score Credit Scoring System
inventory_metadata.disclaimer: This is an independent external assessment built from publicly available information and synthetic data. Not affiliated with UGRO Capital.

models.primary_use: MSME credit underwriting — predicts probability of default (PD) for loan applicants
models.decision_use: Approve / Reject / Refer loan applications; set interest rate tier

training_data.source: Synthetic MSME dataset (proxy) — bureau, banking, GST data
training_data.training_period: Disbursed loans only (reject inference limitation applies)

risk_rating.rating_rationale: Directly drives lending decisions across entire MSME portfolio. Gradient boosted ensemble with 25,000+ features (per public disclosure). Limited interpretability without SHAP. Reject inference bias in training data.

known_limitations: Reject inference bias: model trained only on disbursed loans; no ground truth for rejected applicants
Proxy model: built on synthetic data; does not reflect actual GRO Score 3.0 weights or architecture
Protected attributes (gender, state, sector) included as features — requires bias monitoring
Average precision of 0.40 indicates moderate lift; 41% of defaults are missed (false negatives)
Model performance may degrade if MSME economic conditions shift materially from training period
regulatory_references: RBI Digital Lending Guidelines 2022 — Fair Practices Code
RBI Master Direction on NBFC — model risk expectations
EU AI Act — credit scoring classified as High Risk AI System (Article 6)

validation_status.finding_summary: Critical: algorithmic bias against female proprietors identified in bias audit (Module 5). High: reject inference limitation not documented in model card at deployment. Medium: PSI monitoring not implemented at go-live.
